hero_subtitle: SFTY provides executives with a centralized view to manage case creation, escalation, and closure while preserving audit-ready evidence across compliance workflows.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow

trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Compliance case control lacks operational clarity
problem_description: Without a unified control layer, case creation, ownership and escalation often depend on manual handoffs that obscure workflow transparency. This leads to slower review cycles, unclear decision history and weaker audit readiness for compliance leadership and risk teams.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY consolidates case creation, ownership, escalation and audit evidence into a unified workflow that delivers clear operational oversight and decision traceability for VASP compliance leadership.
workflow_title: From case creation to decision closure
workflow_description: SFTY structures case workflows by assigning ownership, managing escalation, recording decisions, preserving evidence and supporting audit-ready closure steps for executives.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Not another workflow tool. Enterprise case control
why_sfty_description: SFTY provides VASP executives a provider-neutral layer to connect compliance cases, decisions and evidence for clear ownership, scalable oversight and audit-ready control.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY provides VASP leadership with a controlled, audit-ready compliance layer supporting provider orchestration, evidence preservation and bank due diligence at enterprise scale.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP executive teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides VASP executives with a connected compliance operating view that reduces risk, improves auditability and supports scalable control over case creation, escalation and closure.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY control compliance case workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures case workflows by connecting alerts, provider outputs and policies into controlled review, assignment, escalation and resolution processes with transparent ownership and decision logs.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case history and supporting evidence in a secure audit trail to enable review readiness and support regulatory or internal inspections.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects existing KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one operational layer without disrupting your current compliance stack.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC or KYT providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace providers but turns their outputs into structured workflows, decisions, regulatory rule updates, cases and audit evidence.
final_title: Manage case control and audit readiness with SFTY
final_description: Review how SFTY supports case creation, escalation workflows, decision records and scalable compliance control for VASP leadership teams.
